description: The GrabTransformReset component resets transforms of a grabbable on the same slot upon grab and/or release.

fields.ResetPositionOnGrab: Whether to set the grabbable position to 0 on grab.
fields.ResetRotationOnGrab: Whether to set the grabbable rotation to 0 on grab.
fields.ResetScaleOnGrab: Whether to set the grabbable scale to 1 on grab.
fields.ResetPositionOnRelease: Whether to set the grabbable position to 0 on release.
fields.ResetRotationOnRelease: Whether to set the grabbable rotation to 0 on release.
fields.ResetScaleOnRelease: Whether to set the grabbable scale to 1 on release.

usage: Attach to the same slot as a grabbable Component to utilize its features.
